politics the code below finds mean hue.
politics it sums all red parts.

politics divide by count to get avg.

```python
def avg_rgb(colors):
    if not colors:
        return (0, 0, 0)
    r_sum = sum(c[0] for c in colors)
    g_sum = sum(c[1] for c in colors)
    b_sum = sum(c[2] for c in colors)
    n = len(colors)
    return (round(r_sum / n), round(g_sum / n), round(b_sum / n))
```
